title: Bimeh Markazi Iran (Central Insurance of I.R. Iran) — English Annual Reports, FY 1384-1391 (2005-2013)
source_org: Central Insurance of the Islamic Republic of Iran (Bimeh Markazi Iran)
units: described within each PDF (mostly Iranian Rial billions/millions for premiums, losses, financial statements)
license_terms: Bimeh Markazi Iran public publication; no explicit license stated on site
notes: Direct access to https://en.centinsur.ir returns HTTP 403 'Access Denied - blocked from your IP or location' (an ArvanCloud/CDN-style geo/IP block; both en.centinsur.ir and the Persian centinsur.ir root return the same 403 page from this agent's network). Recovered via Wayback Machine CDX API (https://web.archive.org/cdx/search/cdx?url=centinsur.ir&matchType=domain&output=json&filter=urlkey:.*\.pdf), which surfaced ~2,090 PDF URLs ever crawled under the centinsur.ir domain (all subdomains/paths). Filtered to filenames containing 'annualreport' and picked the most recent 200-status snapshot for each distinct report. Found 8 distinct English-language annual reports covering fiscal years 1384/85 through 1391 (2005/06-2012/13) hosted under three different legacy CMS paths over the years (/files/files/, /Dorsapax/Data/Sub_0/File/, /dorsapax/Data/Sub_0/File/ — inconsistent casing in the live site's own URLs, preserved as-is in original_name). The FY1391 edition's filename on the CDX was the generic 'ANNUAL REPORT.pdf' (no year in the name); its actual fiscal year (1391 / 2012-2013) was confirmed by reading the extracted PDF text, which repeatedly references 'the year 1391 (2012-2013)' figures — renamed at download time to annualreport_1391_2012-2013.pdf per bookkeeping rule 2 (original name recorded in files[].original_name). All 8 files verified as real PDF documents (`file` command confirms 'PDF document', correct page counts via pdfinfo: 38-44 pages each for the scanned early editions, 21 pages for the 1391 edition). The four earliest editions (FY1384/85 through FY1387/88) are scanned/image-based PDFs with no embedded text layer (pdftotext returns 0 words) — this is a property of the original documents as published, not a download defect; content was still visually verified via file size/page count sanity checks. No newer reports (FY1392/2013-14 onward) were found in the CDX index under obvious 'annualreport'-style filenames within this session's search budget — the live site being geo-blocked meant we could not browse its current publications listing to find later editions' exact URLs to seed further CDX lookups; a follow-up session could search CDX more broadly (e.g. 'performance report', 'Persian gozaresh amalkard' filenames, or the newer /_douranportal/documents/ CMS path which is clearly still active per 2025-dated crawls seen in the same CDX query) to extend coverage.

failures.reason: HTTP 403 Access Denied - IP/location block (ArvanCloud-style CDN block), confirmed on both en.centinsur.ir and centinsur.ir root
HTTP 403 Access Denied - IP/location block, same as above
